title: "Malformed database schema" when creating a failing index within a transaction
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 TEXT, c3 DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (9223372036854775807, 'max int', 1.0);
key_bug_features: Index creation within a transaction allows integer overflow
